text:
There once was a curious cat. Every morning she would sit quietly by her window. Birds fluttered outside. She gazed. A robin. She loved robins. One day she noticed something. One didn.).

Oh my stars! she whispered.

There was a tiny mouse?!

She leaned out. Just peeked. Maybe friendship? The mouse squeaked. She blinked. No claws.

One night she sat vigil outside a mouse hole. Lots of dark.

There wasn owl.

She chuckled.

Maybe I could protect her?.

Weeks passed.

She watched.

He lived. Alone.

She saw. No predators.

Perhaps.

She cuddled.

Then?

Nighttime owls!

She scared her. Badly.

Away. Never again.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
